name: Chia Crackers with Turmeric Guacamole
method: Soak the chia seeds in 10 tablespoons of water for about one hour. In a bowl, mix together the chia seeds, almond pulp, nutritional yeast, and salt. Spread the mixture very thinly over a sheet of parchment paper. With the back of a knife, mark out 2" x 2" squares, which you divide diagonally. Dehydrate the crackers at 107°F (42°C) for about 20 hours, or until the crackers are thoroughly dried out. Store the crackers in a tin with a tight-fitting lid.

GUACAMOLE: In a bowl, mash the avocados with a fork (or mix them in a food processor) until you have a smooth cream. Dice the tomato and chop the onion, then mix them with the avocado. Add salt, turmeric, and chili. Taste and adjust for more salt or heat.
